channel.title: Easter on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Easter on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Bam-Bam Sally — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: Bam-Bam Sally is back from the seawall, full of cook-up and opinions, and she has PLENTY to say about the week's events, the national cleanup, and certain people who think she doesn't notice things.

item.title: De Boys Seh — Sunday, April 12, 2026
item.description: De boys gather after Easter Sunday church and kite-flying to assess the week: the pilot in the jungle, the gas contract revelations, the cleanup exercise, and why Berbice always get the last hospital.

item.title: Miss Violet's Corner — Barbados, Monday April 6, 2026
item.description: Miss Violet, retired teacher from St Philip, is very proud of PM Mottley and unimpressed by people who did not vote.

item.title: De Boys Seh — April 6, 2026
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar debate Easter kite regulations, whether CARIFTA medals count as homework excuses, and the ongoing philosophy of the $100,000 cash grant.

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar — De Kite and de Corentyne River
item.description: Is Easter Monday on de seawall. Speedeet and Wilar build a kite from scratch, argue about aerodynamics, nearly take out an auntie roti, and lose de kite to Suriname. A perfect day.

item.title: Speedeet & Wilar — The Easter Kite
item.description: Speedeet and Wilar try to fly a kite on Easter Monday on the seawall. The kite has other plans. A Pike Street Easter adventure.
